name: Soccer Predict
tagline: Codex football analysis with T-30 rechecks and verified reviews
description: Football match analysis for Codex and OpenClaw using Titan007 Asian handicap, totals, European odds, lineups, half-time and HT/FT data. Includes visual output, timezone-safe T-30 lineup rechecks, one machine-readable primary pick per match, verified post-match settlement, primary-first ROI statistics, and cautious calibration guardrails without small-sample automatic weight changes.
